title: Provider Resources
text:
- 4 MB] Download the full 2021 STI Treatment Guidelines.
Please note: the wall chart is an 18×24 poster and not suitable for at-home printing.
Other Resources Mycoplasma genitalium (Mgen) Treatment Failure Registry – Healthcare providers and health departments can report Mgen treatment failures to the CDC. (December 12, 2022)
Suspected Gonorrhea Treatment Failure Consultation Form – Healthcare providers and health departments can report suspected gonorrhea cephalosporin treatment failure or any N. gonorrhoeae specimen with decreased cephalosporin susceptibility to the CDC. (December 12, 2022)
Medscape Commentary – CDC experts highlight five key changes to know about the 2021 STI Treatment Guidelines. (October 12, 2022)
National STD Curriculum – An online modular learning experience that helps users learn how to manage STDs. Free CME/CNE available.
STD Clinical Consultation Network – A free STD consultation service for healthcare providers provided by the National Network of STD Clinical Prevention Training Centers (NNPTC).
STI Treatment Guidelines Questions and Answers – CDC experts address questions and comments from partners, stakeholders, and providers about the updated guidelines. (December 18, 2020)
A Guide for Taking a Sexual History – This booklet provides guidance on how to discuss sexual health issues with patients.
Drug
